MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JAVIER CHAVARRIA Motion to Bifurcate. Appearances: J. Andrew Lawson, Esq. of Severson & Werson (415) 398-3344, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Counsel gave notice pursuant to Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied without prejudice to being re-raised in the trial department.
